creator: wisdom@isogo.dyndns.org
text:
Created attachment 232218
c++: note: diagnostic msg

I've tried to build world several times.  However all trials failed on same place with same error (clang frontend crashed).  Following is a part of the console log.

= = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = =
$ uname -a
FreeBSD raspi.isogo.dyndns.org 13.1-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 13.1-PRERELEASE #14 stable/13-11045f1b7: Mon Feb 28 12:09:56 JST 2022     root@raspi.isogo.dyndns.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/arm64.aarch64/sys/GENERIC  arm64
$ cd /usr/src; sudo make buildworld
...
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://bugs.freebsd.org/submit/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
